3125140.name: Answer Campus: First Semester
3125140.description:
New Location, New Friends, New Reputation. How do you want to be perceived?

Answer Campus: First Semester is a comic book style visual novel that guides you, a first-year student at the illustrious A&C University, through the hectic and tumultuous first months of college life. As you settle in to your new life at A&C, you will meet a diverse and colorful cast of characters with their own motivations, qualities, and flaws; each on their own journey, but with uncertain destinations. Along the way, you will balance your interactions with your peers (and professors) with your academic commitments. With each conversation you have with your fellow Sentinels, no matter how quaint it may seem, you build how people see you - and perhaps how they might see the world. What will your campus legacy be?

Features

  • Developed by students at the University of Miami and beyond, with reference to real world testimonials and experiences.

  • Colorful hand drawn characters

  • Choose which characters you want to deepen your relationship with

  • Multiple endings that define your relationships

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
